title: rhodanthemum ifniense
intro: Rhodanthemum ifniense, also known as Canary Island crested daisy or Ifni daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Canary Islands, for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhodanthemum ifniense include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and soothe digestive issues.
